nulla_intro.speaker: Nulla
lines: The static door is still here, but Area 111 is louder now.
Gather the memory static if you want the old prototype to stop humming.
SRMT's throne is less subtle than any door and somehow worse at hospitality.

nulla_after_battle.speaker: Nulla
lines: The static clears.
SRMT's throne is less subtle than any door.
If Shrububu smells KFC from here, believe her. Area 111 lies about everything except grease.

pub_gummies.speaker: Pub Keeper
lines: Welcome to Area 111, ruined pink capital of questionable nightlife.
Shrububu asks for KFC. We serve Gummies.
Suhas at the bar has already decided this is somehow your fault, and SRMT's tax bell just laughed.

suhas_intro.speaker: Suhas
lines: You walk into my pub, insult the Gummies, and ask for chicken?
Fine, Shrububu. Bar fight.
If you win, take the bike. Take the musical guitar. Take my dignity too, apparently.

suhas_defeat.speaker: Suhas
lines: The floor is very close, and I respect it now.
Take the bike. Take the guitar. SRMT never liked my music anyway.
If you find KFC, do not bring me Gummies as revenge.

guitar_reward.speaker: Shrububu
lines: Suhas is down. The bike keys are sticky. The musical guitar shoots notes.
This is not KFC, but it is useful.
Area 111 opens toward the fallen mansion.
The guitar answers from inside its case.

mansion_court_clues.speaker: Ruined Court Record
lines: The fallen mansion puzzle points to SRMT's court.
Every clue from Ishiville bends toward the throne room.
Behind SRMT: KFC storage. Behind the storage: IshiYoga.

srmt_intro.speaker: SRMT
lines: Shrububu, welcome to the ruined court of Area 111.
I am eating KFC because tyranny should have texture.
Bring the musical guitar or do not waste my bucket time.

srmt_defeat.speaker: SRMT
lines: The notes... the bike grease... the accumulated inconvenience...
Fine. Take the KFC. Take Ishiville.
IshiYoga is behind the throne, which was poor dungeon planning.

ishiyoga_rescue.speaker: Shrububu
lines: Shrububu frees IshiYoga from the KFC dungeon corner.
They open the bucket together.
The bucket finally opens without a trap.
Ishiville smells like rain, neon, and finally KFC.

pink_hooligan.speaker: Pink Hooligan
lines: We ruined the cute-town vibe on purpose. It was too emotionally organized.
SRMT said chaos is cheaper than maintenance.
Then you arrived asking for KFC and somehow made us look subtle.

gummy_regular.speaker: Gummy Regular
lines: I have eaten Gummies for six years and can now hear wallpaper.
The wallpaper says SRMT keeps chicken behind the court.
The wallpaper has been right about parking tickets before.

bike_mechanic.speaker: Bike Mechanic
lines: Suhas's bike runs on spite, club smoke, and one missing screw named Kevin.
The guitar rack is welded to the side because Area 111 zoning died years ago.
Ride toward the mansion if you want SRMT. Ride away if you want dental insurance.

hello_ruin_vendor.speaker: Cute-Ruin Vendor
lines: I sell tiny pink crowns from the old town mascot era.
SRMT melted the mascot statue into a throne cupholder.
No KFC coupons, but one crown is shaped like a drumstick if you squint angrily.

court_bailiff_echo.speaker: Bailiff Echo
lines: All rise for the defendant, the plaintiff, the bucket, and the impossibly large woman with a guitar.
The court recognizes Shrububu's claim to KFC.
The court also recognizes that SRMT should have hidden IshiYoga somewhere less obvious.

clue_pub_menu.speaker: Pub Menu
lines: The menu lists Gummies in twelve textures and zero acceptable dinners.
A grease stain on the back points toward SRMT's court, which is suspiciously close to actual KFC smell.

clue_bike_keys.speaker: Bike Keys
lines: Suhas's keys jingle in a rhythm the musical guitar answers.
The keychain says, 'Do not ride into throne room unless dramatically necessary.'

clue_throne_bucket_grease.speaker: Throne Grease
lines: Fresh KFC grease trails from SRMT's throne to a dungeon door.
Every previous clue suddenly feels less metaphorical and much more delicious.

area111_post_clear_pub.speaker: Pub Keeper
lines: After SRMT falls, the Gummies are demoted to side dish.
The pub adds KFC to the menu by writing it in huge letters and hoping Shrububu approves.

area111_post_clear_court.speaker: Ruined Court
lines: The court is silent after IshiYoga is freed.
Then the throne burps out one last SRMT receipt and the whole room pretends not to see it.
